response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive full-stack and backend experience with multiple languages (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, C/C++), his resume lacks direct experience with C++ as the primary language in recent roles, particularly in industrial automation or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices per IEC 62443-4-1 standards. His cloud and IoT experience is limited to web-based platforms rather than industrial protocols or on-premises systems.
strengths: Strong background in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., DLang for micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
Proven expertise in secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and mentorship
Diverse experience in full-stack development, embedded systems, and robotics, demonstrating adaptability and problem-solving skills
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience as a primary language; most recent C/C++ roles were over 7 years ago (National Instruments)
No explicit mention of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or SDL implementation in professional work
Lacks direct experience with industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (Azure) required for this role
